LanguageData.QT_TerminationBeginMessage: {0} has entered Termination phase! Watch the charge bar and press "Dodge" once it turns red.
LanguageData.QT_DodgedMessage: Dodged in time! QT's charge resets.
LanguageData.QT_DodgedTooEarlyMessage: Too early. Wait until the bar turns red.
LanguageData.QT_TerminationDetonatedMessage: QT has detonated! The blast wave tore through the area.
LanguageData.QT_ArrivalLetterText: An unusually cheerful visitor named QT is approaching your colony. She seems friendly for now, but there's something unsettling about her smile.
